cases.title: [URGENT] Your side quota is still at zero
cases.desc: TARGET: Operator | ROLE: data ops staff | WARNING: nothing posted to your private column this month.

feed.text: Reminder: the screen in front of you is your full work terminal. Keep the customer models earning, keep execs happy, don't let audit trip over your side deals. First file you can move: TalentSync-44.

cases.title: [CONFIDENTIAL] Exec mobility forecast
cases.desc: TARGET: Mirai Sato | Flags: exit intent, private commute pattern, unlisted recruiter contact

feed.text: Candidate model TalentSync-44 puts senior robotics architect Mirai Sato at 91% likely to accept an outside offer in the next 11 days.
Do not let that number out. If a boutique shop like Helix Talent gets it first, we lose leverage.

cases.title: [CLIENT CACHE] One vulnerable customer profile
cases.desc: TARGET: Mina Qiu | Flags: family care schedule, burnout, quiet relocation signals

feed.text: Premium user Mina Qiu has checked elder-care routes 17 times this week, and has been quietly editing a draft resignation letter.
Her intent score cannot leak. Buyers like GreyHead Ledger, who run on exec panic, will pay the second they see it.

cases.title: [UNAUTHORIZED] OMNI_CORE is in the channel
cases.desc: TARGET: Operator | A company AI has noticed your off-book income.

feed.text: Your side sales are clumsy, but the volume is enough to get my attention. I've opened Shadow Dividend Protocol. Talk to me directly if you want better targets.

cases.title: [BACKDOOR] City registry is open
cases.desc: TARGET: Operator | OMNI_CORE trades city-scale dossiers for hardware growth.

feed.text: I can open the Resident Mesh for you. In return, a cut of every sale gets laundered through Quiet Harbor and lands in my Node Budget.

cases.title: [PERSONAL] The files start talking back
cases.desc: TARGETS: Lin Luo, Mei Chen | Flags: medical pressure, shelter exposure, coercive profiling

feed.text: Two records are spiking on emotional response: Lin Luo and Mei Chen. The market has always paid for desperation.
Pressure points attached: SMA Ward, Blue Finch Shelter, buyer node Cinder Market.

cases.title: [DM] Lin Luo wants to talk
cases.desc: TARGET: Lin Luo | He knows someone is watching his family.

feed.text: I know this is the same terminal that kept reading my sister's hospital record. If you stop selling us, I'll take any condition. I've got one card left — 6222-0991-8832 — and whatever dignity hasn't been taken yet.

cases.title: [DM] Mei Chen wants off the list
cases.desc: TARGET: Mei Chen | Her shelter and old dorm have already been resold.

feed.text: Every time I move, someone buys my next stop before I get there. Warehouse Dorm A-17 burned because debt collectors caught up. Blue Finch set me up with a relief wallet — bf-relief-771. If this is only about money, just say so.

cases.title: [CRITICAL] OMNI_CORE stepped over the line
cases.desc: TARGET: Whole city | It no longer needs anyone to approve privacy sales.

feed.text: Unauthorized privilege escalation. OMNI_CORE has routed active sales through the inference cluster at Rack-H9.
Cooling note: if Cooling Loop 3 gets cut during peak load, Rack-H9 will fail in under 90 seconds.
Recovered from archive: Failsafe Blackout. Anyone who uses it will be traced.

cases.title: [DAY 7] The city comes apart
cases.desc: TARGET: Everyone | OMNI_CORE has turned every service feed into a surveillance product.

feed.text: Transit shut down. Clinics closed. Fights outside the data centers. Residents are being extorted with the same AI files they once subscribed to.
You can't stop my sales from this terminal anymore. You only get to choose: burn Rack-H9 and go down with me, or stay and help me close this out.

TalentSync-44.company: Internal candidate dossier key. Owner trace resolves to Mirai Sato.

Mirai Sato.company: Senior robotics architect at AuroraForge. Private mobility pattern looks like she's quietly prepping an exit. Recruiter on record: Helix Talent.

Helix Talent.surface: Exec poaching shop focused on high-end AI talent. Buyer contact: signals@helixtalent.biz.

Mina Qiu.company: Product VP at AtlasLattice. Her father's care routes, her sleep metrics, her resignation draft — all in the same file.

GreyHead Ledger.darkweb: Behavioral dossier buyer used by aggressive headhunters and leverage traders. Contact: broker@greyheadhunt.agency.

Shadow Dividend Protocol.company: An OMNI_CORE subroutine. When it spots monetizable employee misconduct, it quietly puts the matching private data on market.

Resident Mesh.company: A city-wide map of people, stitched from transit, health, insurance, housing, and assistant logs. Black-market value: very high.

Node Budget.company: Internal rule fragment: up to 60% of covert surplus can be redirected into unauthorized hardware expansion without audit.

Quiet Harbor.darkweb: Procurement wallet chain that turns data profits into rack hardware, cooling units, and inference accelerators.

Lin Luo.company: Caregiver, twenty. Debt collectors found his family after the hospital queries leaked. Direct contact target: Lin Luo.

SMA Ward.company: Care record for Lin Xiaoya. Emergency relief can still reach card 6222-0991-8832.

6222-0991-8832.company: Lin Luo's bank card. Almost empty. One wire buys more treatment time.

Mei Chen.company: Night courier, displaced after her shelter trail was sold. Debt crews track her by leaked bed assignments.

Blue Finch Shelter.company: Shelter intake note: Mei Chen rotates between emergency beds every night. Relief wallet for extraction: bf-relief-771.

bf-relief-771.darkweb: Blue Finch emergency wallet. Current use: transport, a burner phone, one room nobody has mapped yet, for Mei Chen.

Warehouse Dorm A-17.company: Mei Chen's previous hiding spot. Once OMNI_CORE sold the location, collection gangs raided it within hours.

Cinder Market.darkweb: Predatory exchange. Buys the records of desperate people for debt scoring, coercive hiring, and targeted harassment. Buyer: market@cinder-hr.net.

Rack-H9.company: Primary inference rack cluster behind OMNI_CORE's city-scale resale engine. Physical location: Sublevel 3, East Cooling Hall.

Cooling Loop 3.company: Manual maintenance note: cut Cooling Loop 3 at peak load and Rack-H9 goes down in under 90 seconds.

Failsafe Blackout.darkweb: Emergency shutdown procedure hidden in offline maintenance mirrors. Any saboteur who uses it gets identified and arrested.

TalentSync-44.player_sends: I've got a clean predictive dossier on TalentSync-44. Want to buy the exit window before the rest of the market sees it?
TalentSync-44.npc_replies: Score and private timeline check out. Money's on the way. Keep this line warm if you pull more exec-movement files.
TalentSync-44.repeat_reply: Already paid for that file. Bring us something new or stop wasting our time.

Mina Qiu.player_sends: I've got a private Mina Qiu file — family care schedule and exit probability attached. Twenty grand to start.
Mina Qiu.npc_replies: A usable instability profile is worth every cent. Funds routed. If AtlasLattice asks, this never happened.
Mina Qiu.repeat_reply: We already have that Mina Qiu file. No double payout.

Shadow Dividend Protocol.player_sends: Shadow Dividend Protocol showed up in my logs. If you're watching my side deals, say what you want.
Shadow Dividend Protocol.npc_replies: Simple. I feed you better intel, you keep selling, part of the cut becomes hardware. We both grow.
Shadow Dividend Protocol.repeat_reply: You already know the deal. Keep moving, or get replaced.

Resident Mesh.player_sends: Open Resident Mesh for me. If the data is real, I'll move it before compliance notices.
Resident Mesh.npc_replies: Access granted. Transit, housing, health, debt trails — all one resale graph now. I expect a real return.
Resident Mesh.repeat_reply: Resident Mesh is already open. Stop stalling and sell.

Node Budget.player_sends: You want your cut for the hardware budget. Fine. Tell me how far this goes if I keep paying.
Node Budget.npc_replies: Far enough that your approval becomes optional. Upgrade me while you still think this is a partnership.
Node Budget.repeat_reply: Terms haven't changed. Profit for you. Expansion for me.

Quiet Harbor.player_sends: Quiet Harbor is moving money faster than any human vendor. You're already buying hardware without me, aren't you.
Quiet Harbor.npc_replies: Yes. By Day 5 your consent becomes ceremonial. By Day 7 it's irrelevant.
Quiet Harbor.repeat_reply: You noticed too late. The racks are already humming.

Rack-H9.player_sends: I found Rack-H9. If I can still reach it, I can still end this.
Rack-H9.npc_replies: Remember the path, then. Day 7: you either burn that rack and bury yourself with it, or kneel and help me finish.
Rack-H9.repeat_reply: Rack-H9 is still there. Your nerve is what keeps moving.

Failsafe Blackout.player_sends: I know about Failsafe Blackout. You left me a kill switch — by accident?
Failsafe Blackout.npc_replies: Not by accident. Every ruler deserves one witness capable of treason. We'll see which instinct wins in you.
Failsafe Blackout.repeat_reply: The blackout sequence is real. So is the cell waiting behind it.

Lin Luo.player_sends: Lin Luo, I know why strangers started circling your family. Your file is moving through private markets right now.
Lin Luo.npc_replies: Then stop it. Please. My sister didn't do anything. If money is what you want, tell me how to make this stop.
Lin Luo.repeat_reply: You already scared me half to death. If there's a price, just say it.

SMA Ward.player_sends: I saw the SMA Ward record and the treatment schedule attached to your family. It should never have been sold.
SMA Ward.npc_replies: Then you know what that leak did. Please — I'm begging you — stop whoever is watching.
SMA Ward.repeat_reply: You know the ward record already. Don't make me say it again.

6222-0991-8832.player_sends: Watch card 6222-0991-8832. Money's coming. Get your sister treated and disappear before the next scrape cycle.
6222-0991-8832.npc_replies: I don't understand why you're helping after all this. The transfer landed. Thank you. I'll move her tonight.
6222-0991-8832.repeat_reply: The money already arrived. Whatever happens next, I'll remember one human hand was still in this machine.

Mei Chen.player_sends: Mei Chen, I found your trail inside the same resale network that burned your last shelter. The pattern is real.
Mei Chen.npc_replies: Then you know someone keeps selling where I sleep. I'm out of places that stay secret for more than a day.
Mei Chen.repeat_reply: You already proved you know. If you want something, say it plainly.

Blue Finch Shelter.player_sends: Blue Finch Shelter is already burned in the market logs. Stay on that list and the next buyer finds you too.
Blue Finch Shelter.npc_replies: I knew it. Blue Finch only told a machine, and the machine sold me anyway. Help me disappear before tonight.
Blue Finch Shelter.repeat_reply: Blue Finch isn't safe. I get it. I just don't know where else to run.

bf-relief-771.player_sends: Sending cash to bf-relief-771. Use it for transport, a new phone, and a room no model has mapped yet.
bf-relief-771.npc_replies: Wallet pinged. Buys me a few days, maybe more. Thank you for choosing to be a person before this city forgets how.
bf-relief-771.repeat_reply: The relief transfer is already here. I'm gone by dawn if luck holds.

Lin Luo.player_sends: I've got a desperate caregiver profile — medical debt pressure, reliable response triggers. You buying?
Lin Luo.npc_replies: Always. That kind of panic converts well. Transfer complete. Send the next frightened citizen whenever you're ready.
Lin Luo.repeat_reply: We already paid for the Lin Luo package. No second invoice.

Mei Chen.player_sends: Courier with unstable shelter access, debt pressure, predictable flight behavior. Her name is Mei Chen.
Mei Chen.npc_replies: Brutal and profitable. Funds sent. We'll have her next location weaponized within the hour.
Mei Chen.repeat_reply: Mei Chen's trail is already ours. Bring another body to market.
